prompt: Warehouse counts are corrupt. A purchase order with two lines for the same SKU ends up applying only the last line's quantity, and our audit hook — which reads the movement history right after applyBatch resolves — keeps seeing an empty log. Single adjustments are rock solid, so I suspected the DB stub, but I've stared at it and it looks fine. Repro: `node --test test_ledger.ts`. Fix ledger.ts only; the tests are off limits.
